title: Generation Models Know Space: Unleashing Implicit 3D Priors for Scene Understanding
relevance_reason: Highly relevant to Spatial AGI: leverages implicit 3D spatial priors from video generation models to enhance multimodal LLMs' geometric reasoning and physical understanding. Addresses spatial blindness in VLMs through VEGA-3D framework, enabling better 3D scene understanding and embodied manipulation without explicit 3D supervision.

title: Perceptio: Perception Enhanced Vision Language Models via Spatial Token Generation
relevance_reason: Directly addresses VLM spatial grounding limitations through explicit spatial token generation. Integrates semantic segmentation tokens and depth tokens within LLM autoregressive sequence, enabling fine-grained 2D and 3D spatial reasoning. Achieves SOTA on spatial understanding benchmarks including referring expression segmentation and spatial reasoning tasks.

title: Reconstruction Matters: Learning Geometry-Aligned BEV Representation through 3D Gaussian Splatting
relevance_reason: Integrates explicit 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction into BEV perception for autonomous driving. Addresses lack of geometric understanding in end-to-end BEV frameworks by learning geometry-aligned feature representations. Achieves SOTA on nuScenes and Argoverse datasets, demonstrating importance of explicit 3D representation for accurate spatial perception.
